Validation_Check: Verify the detection objective is clearly documented and aligned to the assessment scope
Verify the detection is mapped to the appropriate MITRE ATT&CK tactic and technique
Verify all required telemetry sources are available to support the detection
Verify the detection rule is deployed and operational within Splunk
Verify search logic accurately identifies the intended security event
Verify simulated activity generates the expected alert
Verify related events are successfully correlated into a meaningful detection
Verify malicious activity is not missed during validation
Confirm detection consistently identifies the intended behavior
Review thresholds filters exclusions and correlation logic to reduce noise
Verify the detection contributes to ATT&CK coverage objectives
Verify detection evidence screenshots searches logs and findings are documented
Verify detection validation has been reviewed and approved by the reviewer
Verify all findings recommendations and lessons learned have been documented
